children.heading: No funds to provide firearms or training
children.label: a No funds to provide firearms or training
children.text: No amounts provided as a grant under this subchapter may be used for the provision to any person of a firearm or training in the use of a firearm.

children.heading: No effect on other laws
children.label: b No effect on other laws
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter may be construed to preclude or contradict any other provision of law authorizing the provision of firearms or training in the use of firearms.
